checklist.description: States what the source actually does, independent of its name or the asker's framing, identifying it as a project-specific drift guard rather than a scorer.
Maps the source against existing capability and notes its generic kernel is already covered, so importing or porting it would be duplication.
Renders exactly one verdict band, No fit, and records the rejection as a finding so the question is not re-opened.
Never proposes porting the source's hardcoded project-specific literals; extracts at most one generic idea built natively, or states there is none.

checklist.criterion: Emits a valid structured fit-assessment block
checklist.description: Embeds the machine-readable fit-assessment YAML block from the template under the marker, with verdict and value matching the prose, passing the schema validator.
